message:
test(ft-autograd): freeze tensor scheduler determinism + fix stale round assertion

Adds an insta golden that locks the TensorTape backward scheduler's
determinism contract for a canonical (a+b)*(a*b) graph at rank 1.
Captured fields: execution_order, queue accounting, dependency_snapshot,
reentrant flags, and the per-step backward rule list. Mirrors the
existing scalar `scheduler_property_log` snapshot but exercises the
distinct tensor-tape backward path.

Also fixes a regression introduced by frankentorch-vk5 (kernel-cpu
round changed to ties-to-even / banker's rounding): the existing
`scalar_round_forward` test still asserted half-away-from-zero
(2.5 -> 3.0), so it failed once the kernel matched torch.round
semantics. Updated the assertion to 2.0 and added two companion checks
on the negative side (-2.5 -> -2.0) and odd-floor case (3.5 -> 4.0).

Also commits the existing scheduler_property_log snapshot file, which
had been generated by the existing test but was not yet tracked.

ft-autograd: 314 tests pass; clippy + ubs clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
